notes: Starts the Option 1 modern earthy UI direction as a broad Upper Michigan Foraging Guide redesign foundation, not a mushroom-only theme.

Adds a desktop sidebar-style shell, darker earthy background, polished green dashboard surface, modern stat tiles, refined buttons, and cleaner card treatments while retaining mobile navigation behavior.
Reworks the home page into a plants-plus-mushrooms foraging dashboard with counts for edible plants, edible mushrooms, medicinal records, caution records, other uses, and current-season highlights.
Keeps the v4.3.189/v4.3.190 safety popup wrapping protections and version-badge guard behavior.
No species records, source data, image fields, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal action logic, Other Uses logic, Needs Review logic, or map features changed.
